name: node-gyp
title: node-gyp
summary: Native addon build tool for Node.js
description:
Native addon build tool for Node.js
node-gyp is a cross-platform command-line tool written in Node.js
for compiling native addon modules for Node.js.
.
It features :
* Easy to use, consistent interface
* Same commands to build a module on every platform
* Support of multiple target versions of Node.js
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side javascript engine.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-gyp because Native addon build tool for Node.js.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-gyp as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `node-gyp <command> [args]` as documented upstream for node-gyp.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-gyp with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-gyp --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
